hooks.command: echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"additionalContext":"Session started. Run Session Start protocol: load MemPalace context, check open work, read git log, read active plan, brief user."}}'
echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"additionalContext":"Before editing: verify this change aligns with the active plan. After editing: review your own change for obvious issues."}}'

echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"additionalContext":"Session ending. Run Session End protocol: store decisions, current state, patterns, and handoff note to MemPalace. Write docs/session-log.md if MemPalace unavailable."}}'
